'''wachawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadooment|kadooment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadooment|kadooment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wachawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchæwæth|wæchæwæth]] || [[word:wæchæwæj|wæchæwæj]] || [[word:wæchæwæsh|wæchæwæsh]] || [[word:wæchæwæ|wæchæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachachawath|wachachawath]] || [[word:wachachawaj|wachachawaj]] || [[word:wachachawash|wachachawash]] || [[word:wachachawa|wachachawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachawath|wachawath]] || [[word:wachawaj|wachawaj]] || [[word:wachawash|wachawash]] || [[word:wachawa|wachawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachafwafth|wachafwafth]] || [[word:wachafwafj|wachafwafj]] || [[word:wachafwafsh|wachafwafsh]] || [[word:wachafwaf|wachafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachawatha|wachawatha]] || [[word:wachawaja|wachawaja]] || [[word:wachawasha|wachawasha]] || [[word:wachawaka|wachawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachawath|wachawath]] || [[word:wachawaj|wachawaj]] || [[word:wachawash|wachawash]] || [[word:wachawa|wachawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachawathal|wachawathal]] || [[word:wachawajal|wachawajal]] || [[word:wachawashal|wachawashal]] || [[word:wachawakal|wachawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachawaathatha|wachawaathatha]] || [[word:wachawaajaja|wachawaajaja]] || [[word:wachawaashasha|wachawaashasha]] || [[word:wachawaaka|wachawaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachawathan|wachawathan]] || [[word:wachawajan|wachawajan]] || [[word:wachawashan|wachawashan]] || [[word:wachawakan|wachawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachawathaoro|wachawathaoro]] || [[word:wachawajaoro|wachawajaoro]] || [[word:wachawashaoro|wachawashaoro]] || [[word:wachawakaoro|wachawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
